titleStmt.title: SII 27.91: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 91. (A.R. No. 601 of 1929-30.) VARAMBAḶḶI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the field called Chandraseṭṭi-gadde by the roadside.

This is dated Śaka 1339, Durmukhi, Chaitra śu. 1, Thursday. In the cyclic year Durmukhi corresponding to Śaka 1338, the given tithi occurred on 1416 A.D., February 29, when the Weekday was Saturday. But in the next year, Hēmaḷambi (Śaka 1339) the given details correspond to 1417 A.D., March 18, Thursday, f.d.t. ·62. The latter seems to be the intended date.

It registers a gift of land in Vorambaḷḷi, an adhivāsa of Brahmūru, to Bichaḷadēva, son of Sōvarasa of Bhāradvāja-gōtra by Nāraṇ-orambaḷḷi son of Vishṇ-ōrambaḷḷi who was the grāmiṇi of the western portion of Brahmūru. It states that Śaṅkaradēva-oḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya. Sāyappaṇṇa son of Dēvappa wrote the record, while the mason Dharaṇi (?), son of Malagōja engraved it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ namastuṁga śirarcuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁ
bha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1336 neya durmukhi sa
ṁvatsarada cayitra śu 1 guruvāradalu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīra
pratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru vijayānagariyali sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ sāṁmrājya
vanu pratipālisuva kāladalli Ā rāyana nirūpadiṁda śaṁkaradēvoḍeyaru bārakūra rājyava
nāḷutiddalli bhāradvāja gōtrada sōvarasara makkaḷu bīcaḷadēvagaḷige brahmūra paḍuva bhāgada grā
maṇi viṣṇūraṁbaḷḷiya maga nāraṇōraṁbaḷḷi koṭṭa śilā śāsanada krama veṁteṁdaḍe vōraṁbaḷḷi
yadhivāsadoḷage tānubaddha braṁhmadāyada mūlada bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍa
haribhaṭṭara bāḷagaḍi gōparasara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu nīru harivasālu mā
yaṁṇaṁgaḷa maṭhadabāḷa gaḍiyiṁda haṁmuda kovvana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuva
lu naḍava heddāriyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu rāmakriṣṇana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi
ṁtī catussīmeyiṁdoḷaguḷḷa bhūmi bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu mūḍe 20
Alli vuḷḷa teṁgu halasu māvu makki maranekke niḍilu nidhinikṣēpa jalapāṣāṇa Akṣiṇi
Āgāma siddhasādhya Aṣṭabhōga tēja svāṁmya (svāṁmya) sahita mahabhūmiyanu Adhdhaparitcēda
vāgi koṁḍu strī putragñāti sāmaṁta dāyādānumatadiṁda sahiraṁṇyōdaka dhārā
pūrvakavāgi mūlaparichyēdavāgi koṭṭenu yi bāḷiṁge dēvasva Ā nāraṇa Orubaḷḷiya ma
neya baḍagaṇa Arasana keṟiya maṭhada dēvarige nāgaṁḍugadalu 7 mūḍe bhattavanu kāla
kālakke naḍasi bāḷuvaru Ī dēvasvada 7 mūḍe bhatta vallade haḍikihodake Akara Anyāya Avu
dū yillade sarvvamāṁnyavāgi bāḷisi koḍuveneṁdu Oḍaṁbaṭṭu koṭṭaśilāśāsana
śāsanada Aḍakakke Ādahoṇe viṣṇōraṁbaḷḷiya maga mallaṁṇa Oraṁbaḷḷi yiṁtappudakke sā
kṣigaḷu Aṁṇōraṁbaḷḷi vāsudēva Oraṁbaḷḷi seṭṭi kāṟa rudriseṭṭi kōṭi taṁmaseṭṭiya Aḷi
hariyappaseṭṭi yiṁtivarubhayānmatadiṁ baradavaru dēvappaṁgaḷa maga sāyappaṁṇa
ṁgaḷu kalkuṭi kalukuṭiga malagōjana maga dharaṇi Akarta nāraṇōraṁbaḷḷiya su
voppa hoṇekāṟanoppa śrī mahādēva śaraṇu sākṣigaḷa Oppa
gōpīnātha seṭṭikāṟa rudriseṭṭiya sākṣiya baraha hariyappa seṭṭiya sākṣi
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchreyōnu pālanaṁ dānātsvargga mavāpnōti pālanāda
cyudaṁ padaṁ norbbanū Ī śāsanava Aḷupidare vāraṇāsiyali koṁ
da dōṣake hōharu nāthadēvarige bicaḷa dēvanu jayaṁtiya maṁgaḷa
mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.91 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
